$comment: Configuration for the API surface parity tests (ApiSurfaceParityTests). 'enabled' is flipped to true by the wa-upgrade process once expected-api-surface.json matches the version being implemented. Overrides document intentional naming deviations of the Blazor wrappers; ignores document intentional omissions (each ignore should carry a reason in 'ignoreReasons').

ignoreReasons.title: native HTML attribute, passed through via AdditionalAttributes
